name: Felkrane League 6 Route V4
author: Felkrane
description: Day 1 route by Felkrane. Works for any relic, pact, and region choice. If Endless, turn off auto-banking until mining section. Abundance struggles most - aim for 10 less than suggested non-combat skill targets.

items.note:
Complete Leagues Tutorial and open Leagues Menu.
This route works for any relic, pact, and region choices. If you go Endless I would turn off auto banking until you get to the mining section. If you pick Abundance, other then quest requirements just get 10 less then what I suggest for non combat skills. Abundance will struggle the most with this guide as I don't take advantage of the relic really at all.
Turn your run off and on
Complete the Yama Agility course until 10 Agility

customItem.label: Exit Yama's Lair and enter Civitas

items.note: Pet Renu, the Quetzal nearby

Run east and a little north to the training dummy, hit it once
Don't train more then one hit

customItem.label: Go south to the general store, buy a bucket if we dont have 1

items.note: Fill a bucket on the nearby water pump

Pickpocket Citizens until you have 28 coin pouches
Steal from the bakery store for food
Open the coin pouches

Steal from men until you have 210 coins
Steal from the bakery store for food
Steal a loaf of Bread from a Bakery Stall and get 20 thieving

customItem.label: Steal some silk from a silk stall

items.note: Sell Silk to the merchant
Cry near a child in the Bazaar

customItem.label: Bank Everything but gold

items.note: Run north to the Docks, talk to a Port Master on the right

customItem.label: Buy 10 Buckets of Sand+Soda Ash, a chisel, and a Glassblowing Pipe from a trade crewmember
customItem.description: Buy everything 1 at a time. if you don't do this you will have to sell them to recoup money

customItem.label: Craft these into Molten Glass at the nearby furnace, bank them
Buy 10 more Buckets of Sand and Soda Ash
Craft these into Molten Glass
Blow the 20 Glass into empty oil lamps
Withdraw gold and a pot

items.note: Pet a Xolo East of the Shrine in Southern Civitas
In the Shrine Salute near the Statue of Quoatlos
Run southeast to the stolen cabbage then sit near it

customItem.label: Collect 6 wheat from the wheatfield to the south

items.note: Make flour in the windmill
Run West and pick some Sweetcorn from the field

customItem.label: Run west to the farming patches, and buy a rake and a bucket from Agelus Farm Shop

items.note: Rake the flower farming patch

customItem.label: Pick up 6 potatoes in the southern field
customItem.description: Keep at least 1

items.note: Run north and Milk a Buffalo at Ortus's farm

customItem.label: Run back into Civitas, then run directly north from the wall until you get to the building in most Northwest Civitas

items.note: Enter the building and follow it to the exit outside of Civitas
Run west near the altar and drink from a bird bath
Activate any prayer beside the altar

customItem.label: Run to northwest to Quetzacil Gorge
Buy a torch and shears from the general store, sell the lamps
customItem.description: sell them 1 at a time

items.note: Light the torch
Shear two Alpacas
Pick 10-15 flax, you will need a few spaces for grapes later
Spin 2 Balls of Wool and the flax into Bowstrings
Take a Quetzal to Aldarin

customItem.label: Run northwest and get a grape barrel from the foreman

items.note: Fill the grape barrel and turn it into the foreman

customItem.label: Bank all but Chisel and Gold

items.note: Run north to the cabbage field and pick up+drop 6 Cabbages

customItem.label: Run to the gem shop to the north
Purchase sapphires to 27, cut them, sell them back 1 at a time
customItem.description: 150 Profit Per

items.note:
Purchase emeralds to 34, cut them, sell them back 1 at a time
450 profit per

Purchase rubies to 46, cut them, sell them back 1 at a time
900 profit per, we need a lot of gold. Abundance can stop much earlier if you want.

customItem.label: Buy, cut, and keep 1 Sapphire, Emerald, and Ruby

items.note: Buy and eat 1 onion at the nearby grocery

Purchase a Stew and Moonlite at the pub, drink the moonlite
Save the stew for later

customItem.label: Take the Quetzal to Tel Teklan
Go to the docks in Western Tel Teklan

items.note: Dance near a trio of bards

customItem.label: Buy 10 Air Rune Packs, 3 Mind Rune packs, and 2 Chaos Rune Packs from the Rune Shop
Purchase Purple Dye from the Dye Shop
Purchase a cup of tea from the Inn
Purchase a pestle and mortar from the general store
Buy a willow and maple shortbow. Plus a Maple Longbow
Bank everything, withdraw gold, axe, tinderbox, small fishing net

items.note: Take the rowboat to the east to Kastori

Run northwest and catch shrimp until 5 fishing
Chop a log and cook the fish whenever you have 1 slot open

Catch Sardines and Herring until 20 fishing
Get 25+ sardines, cook 5 in a row
Catch an anchovy

customItem.label: In the fishing shop buy big fishing net, fishing rod, fly fishing rod, harpoon, lobster pot, 10 bait packs, and 20 feath

items.note:
Run north of Kastori and activate the Statue of Ates
It is a little SE of gemstone

customItem.label: Pet a Caique nearby

items.note: Cast Home Teleport

customItem.label: Purchase Iron through Adamant Scimitars, Mithril Spear, Steel Platelegs, Bronze Platebody, and Adamant Platebody+Platele

items.note: Give Oli the Stew

customItem.label: Purchase 5+ Bird Snares and Box Traps from the General Store

items.note: Purchase a cape and apron from the clothes shop, use the Purple dye on the cape, equip the apron
Purchase a POH from the Agent across the Bazaar
Fish Up a House Key, Old Boot, and a Casket

customItem.label: Take a Quetzal to Auburnvale
Deposit all withdraw runes, food, gold, Cup of Tea, dramen staff

items.note: Drink the cup of tea

customItem.label: Purchase a staff of fire from the staff shop
Equip the dramen staff
Run southeast down the bridge, go to fairy ring BKQ

items.note: Equip the staff of fire

customItem.label: Spawn and kill Tree Spirits via safespot until you get a rune axe
customItem.description: It is 1/32. THIS IS SKIPPABLE as adamant axe is buyable, but there isnt a much easier method to get a rune axe outside of kourend

customItem.label: Enter Zanaris
customItem.description: (no L6 task ID found - kept as custom)

items.note: Requip the dramen staff and enter zanaris

customItem.label: Go grab a task from the slayer master
customItem.description: If easily doable at any point in the guide, do it

customItem.label: Buy Anti Dragon Fire Shield
Kill a cow and keep it's cowhide

items.note: Fairy ring to CKQ then fairy ring back to Auburnvale AIS
Run Southwest to the range in Nemus, cook the rabbit
Eat one
Feed a nearby Dog (Chirbaya) a bone

customItem.label: Run just south of Nemus and activate the Statue of Ates
Run north and tan the cowhide
customItem.description: Keep this for later

customItem.label: Run east and buy any axe you didn't recieve from the tree spirits
Bank everything but axes up to mithril, knife, feathers, tinderbox
customItem.description: You can drop Iron-Steel Axe when done with them, keep mith-rune axes though

customItem.label: Run southwest and get a forestry kit, equip it
customItem.description: I would run back into Auburnvale for WC

items.note: Chop 14 Trees

Burn 13 Logs
Keep 1 Log
Withdraw Gold, and turn at least 1 log into a plank at the sawmill. Purchase a saw here as well

customItem.label: Deposit all and withdraw gold, staff of fire, air/chaos/mind runes, dramen staff.
customItem.description: You will need 40k or so gold here

customItem.label: Use the nearby Fairy Ring to AJP

items.note: Complete a Ribbiting Tale of a Lily Pad Labour Dispute
Defeat a Hill Giant west of the quest

customItem.label: Run west to Cam Torum and enter it
Buy Iron through Rune Pickaxe from the Pickaxe shop

items.note: Buy 5 Law+Nature Runes and 25 Earth Runes at the rune shop

If you are 21 magic already low alch anything
If not do it later when we train magic
Get a haircut

customItem.label: Trim your beard in Cam torum
Buy two Jug packs from the general store here
Buy 100 or more pie dishes and deposit them
Buy an eye of newt pack and a water vial pack
Deposit everything but the pickaxes
Exit Cam Torum and go to Ralos's Rise mine
customItem.description: If you are endless harvest reenable banking of items you collect

items.note:
Mine 19 Tin and Copper
This is for 16 Smithing as well. Mine at least 5 tin and copper even if you are hotfoot. Drop pickaxes once you move onto the next tier

Mine 273 Iron Ore
If you have Abundance it might be worth going to Mistrock or south of Tel Teklan for your iron. If you are hotfoot you will need 10 Iron Bars moving forward, so 25 or so Iron in ore form at least.

customItem.label: Reenter Cam Torum and go to the mine
Mine 25 Coal

items.note:
Mine Calcified Rocks until you get 10 Calcified Deposits and a Calcified Moth from breaking down one. Get 1775+ Shards
Deposits are 1/75 and a moth is 1/4 from there

customItem.label: Mine a Calcified Deposit
customItem.description: (no L6 task ID found - kept as custom)

items.note: Use the moth to teleport you to Cam Torum
Smith 16 Bronze Bars

customItem.label: Smith 16 sets of Bronze Arrowtips
Smith a Bronze Full Helm

items.note:
Smith all but 35 Iron Ore into Bars
This should make 119 Iron bars, if you make less you will need to go collect more Iron :(
Smith 1 Iron Dagger and the rest on sets of Iron Arrowtips
Equip the Iron Dagger

customItem.label: Smith a Bronze Plateskirt

items.note: Withdraw the full Bronze set and equip it
Smith 20 Steel bars
Smith 10 Sets of Steel Bolts (unf)

customItem.label: Smith 5 Sets of Steel Arrowtips

items.note: Either use the Shooting Stars Plugin or Discord, but whenever you can mine a shooting star prioritize it. It is a free hard task

customItem.label: Withdraw Gold, Exit Cam Torum, run southeast to Sunset Coast

items.note: Purchase a Steel Full helm and equip it, also buy a Mithril and Adamant Full Helm
Buy a bucket nearby and fill it with sand

customItem.label: Take the Quetzal to Auburnvale
Deposit all. Withdraw Steel-Rune Axes, Knife, Feathers, Forestry Kit (Equip), and Arrowtips
customItem.description: If you don't have arrowtips, compensate for XP with headless arrows or unstrung bows

customItem.label: Chop 8 Trees
customItem.description: Drop Axes as you no longer need them

items.note: Fletch 8 sets of Arrowshafts

customItem.label: Fletch 8 sets of Headless Arrows
Fletch 8 sets of Bronze Arrows
Chop 50 Oak Logs in Western Auburnvale
customItem.description: Make the arrows when the inventory fills

items.note: Fletch 50 sets of Arrowshafts from Oak Logs

customItem.label: Fletch 100 sets of Headless Arrows

items.note: Fletch 100 sets of Iron Arrows

customItem.label: Make one Oak Shortbow (u)

items.note: Withdraw and string the shortbow, then deposit it

customItem.label: Chop 25 Oak Logs

items.note: Create 25 Oak Stocks

Chop 9 Willow Logs
Willows are in southern Auburnvale

customItem.label: Fletch 2 sets of Arrowshafts from Willow Logs
Fletch 6 sets of Headless Arrows
Fletch 5 sets of Steel Arrows

items.note: Fletch 5 Willow Shortbow (u)

customItem.label: Fletch 1 Willow Shield
Deposit all, withdraw best axe and Tinderbox
Chop 20 Oak Logs

items.note: Burn 20 Oak logs
Burn 100 Willow Logs
Chop 50 Maple Logs
Burn 50 Maple Logs

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw best axe and Gold
Chop 22 Normal Logs
Turn these into Planks and purchase 250 Bronze Nails
Chop 60 Oak Logs
Turn these into Oak Planks
Purchase a Staff of Water from the Staff shop
Quetzal to Aldarin
Deposit all withdraw chisel and gold
Deposit all, withdraw hammer, saw, gold, nails, and planks

items.note: Enter your POH and buy a Parlour

customItem.label: Create 11 Crude wooden chairs to 15 Construction
Buy a workshop room
Buy a kitchen
Deposit all, withdraw hammer, saw, and oak planks
Enter POH and create 13 Repair Benches
Withdraw 24 more Oak Planks go and create 12 more benches
Withdraw 10 more Oak Planks and Gold

items.note: Create a Oak Larder in your POH

customItem.label: Purchase a Games Room
Create a Hoop and stick game

items.note:
Score in the game at least once
Can do this in a bit when you get ranged XP
Withdraw and deposit 101 Pots of Flour from your Larder. DEPOSIT THEM IN THE DEPOSIT BOX ON THE DOCKS.

customItem.label: Withdraw Gold and purchase 75 redberries and 150 Grapes from the Fruits and Veg store in the north
customItem.description: This Pie/Wine section is long and will take a while. If you have Asgarnia/Kandarin/Kourend you can do Pies later easier. But the points matter less.

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw Jugs
Fill 100-200 Jugs with Water
Make 1 Pizza Base, bank this for later
Create 100 Pastry Dough, then 75 Pie Shells, then 100 Uncooked Berry Pies
customItem.description: IF YOU BURN ANY MAKE MORE UNTIL YOU GET 75. DONT MAKE MORE THEN 75

customItem.label: Cook the Pies

items.note: Add Grapes to Jugs of water until you make 100 Jugs

Drink one jug of wine
If you have to restore 6+ health for the task, take damage then drink another

sections.name: Tel Teklan / Kastori Part 2 - Skilling, Crafting, Quests

customItem.label: Take a Quetzal to Tel Teklan
Deposit all and withdraw best pickaxe and bucket of water
Run Northeast to the gemstone spot

items.note: Mine 20 Silver and 3 or more Clay

customItem.label: Go back to Kastori and the furnance
Smelt 20 Silver bars
Use the bucket of water on clay
Deposit all, withdraw Big Fishing Net, fishing bait, fly fishing rod, feathers, axe, tinderbox.
customItem.description: Cut logs and cook the fish when inventory fills

items.note: Run Northwest to the fishing spot

customItem.label: Fish up until you get 10 Cod and 20 Mackerel
Run east to the fishing spot

items.note: Catch 50 Salmon+75 Trout

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw bird snares, scimitars, Willow Shield, best axe, all shortbows, all arrows, food, and rune pickaxe
customItem.description: Need Iron-Addy Scimitar and Shortbow-Maple Shortbow

items.note:
Run east to the Crimson Swift hunting spot. Catch 5 of them
If lots of competition stop at 9, catch longtails in Auburnvale to 17. You only need 12 though

Cut at least 4 teak logs at the nearby trees
If you have Woodsman don't let it burn these

customItem.label: Safespot a Jaguar nearby
Run south to Tonali Cavern entrance near the ponds

items.note: Kill a frog

customItem.label: Run west near Tel Teklan towards the Tropical Wagtails

items.note: Catch 15 of them
Go find the Gemstone Crab, train on it
Train attack to 45ish, equip Mith to Rune weapons
Train Strength to 45ish
Train Defense to 30, equip the willow shield

Train Ranged to 30, equip each of the shortbows
Shoot 6 Iron Arrows at least

customItem.label: Run back to Tel Teklan

items.note: Kill 3 Chickens in under 6 seconds in the pen in the north

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw Gold, Staff of Water, Mind/Chaos/Air, saw, hammer, nails, and food
Purchase some death+Earth runes from the Rune Shop
Start and do Scrambled until you get to the Dragon Cave
customItem.description: Skills can't be boosted, so Abundance you have to get the legit requirements

items.note:
Safespot Red Dragons until you bury 16 Dragon Bones
Use Water Spells over anything else

Make sure you get at least 55 magic and cast Earth blast once
Can train magic at Gemstone Crab instead
Finish Scrambled!

customItem.label: Rowboat to Kastori
Enter the basement in Northeastern Kastori

items.note: Kill the imp with earth spells, keep its ashes

customItem.label: Withdraw Full Mithril and Adamant Sets, Hammer, 5 Steel Bars

items.note: Equip each set
Smith a Steel 2H Sword on the nearby Anvil

customItem.label: Withdraw Bone Shards, Imp Ashes, and some jugs of wine
Quetzal to Ralos Rise

items.note: Bless the jugs of wine, then use the bone shards to train Prayer
Activate Protect from Melee and Smite near the altar

customItem.label: Run southeast of the temple/altar down the pass a little. Activate the Statue of Ates

items.note: Go north and kill an icefiend

customItem.label: Go Northeast towards Huey's mountain, activate the Statue of Ates just west of Huey.

items.note: Teleport to Yama's Lair, scatter the ashes here
Do the Yama Agility Course until 32 and stepped on it 666 times

customItem.label: Exit to Civitas
Withdraw Law+Air+Earth+Nature Runes, Gold, Emerald, Ruby, Ball of Wool, Staff of Fire, and Soft Clay
Run to the house in NE Civitas, go to the 2nd Floor
Telegrab two Gold Bars

items.note: Cast Teleport to Civitas

customItem.label: Go to the crafitng shop and buy every jewelry mold
customItem.description: Including Tiaras

items.note:
Use the Soft Clay on the pottery wheel and then use whatever you make on the nearby Pottery Oven
If it breaks or whatever use your extra

customItem.label: Go to the Furnace

items.note: Make a Emerald Ring
High Alch the Ring

customItem.label: Make a Ruby Amulet (u) and Sapphire Amulet (u)

items.note: String the Amulets

customItem.label: Withdraw 20 Silver Bars
Make them into Tiaras
Purchase 100 Buckets of Sand and Soda Ash from the charter shop
Turn these into Molten Glass

items.note: Then turn those into Unpowered Orbs

customItem.label: Steal from the Cake stall until 34 Thieving
Quetzal to Auburnvale
Withdraw 4 Teak Logs, a full helm, Steel Platelegs, Maple Longbow, Ruby Amulet, Gold, best axe and nails, leather
Chop 2 Oak logs
Turn all logs into planks
Run east to Salvager Outlook Mine.

items.note: Create and fill the medium STASH unit here
Inspect a Green flame, near Salvagers outlook.

customItem.label: Quetzal to Aldarin

items.note: Complete Death on the Isle

customItem.label: Go to the backstage after the quest and get a costume needle

items.note: Craft a pair of leather chaps

customItem.label: Get an Icon to activate the Statue of Ates

items.note:
Activate the Statue of Ates in Northern Aldarin
North of the Gem Store

customItem.label: Withdraw 4 Teak Planks, Saw, Hammer
Enter POH and create a Jacky Jester

items.note: Beat Jacky Jester in a game

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw Dramen Staff head to the Fairy Ring
Go to Zanaris then enter Puro Puro
Collect your free supplies from Elnock

items.note:
Catch Baby Implings until you get a lockpick
Turn in Imps for Jars
Catch any implings until 36 hunter and 200 Imps caught

customItem.label: Leagues teleport to Civitas
Withdraw Staff of Fire, Chaos Runes, Air Runes, Gold, Food
Run to NW Civitias and enter the underground
customItem.description: This is the barracks, the 2nd most NW house

items.note: Defeat a Guard

customItem.label: Exit and head back southeast to the bazaar
Steal from Wealthy Citizens until you have at least 10 Pouches

items.note: Open the Pouches
Steal at least 15 House keys
Pickpocket a knight of varlamore 20 times
Steal Valuables until you have 100+

customItem.label: Steal from Wealthy Citizens/Houses until 65 Thieving

items.note:
Steal from a a Spice Stall
If Abundance also steal from Gem Stall
Pay an Urchin for Information with 15 Valuables

customItem.label: Withdraw Gold and Pizza Base
Buy 1 cheese, raw beef, and 1 tomato the Grocery Store
Assemble the pizza by putting the tomato on the base then cheese on it
Cook the pizza on a range

items.note: Cook the meat and add it to the pizza

customItem.label: Buy 25 more Raw Beef from the Store
Cook them, then deposit half. Withdraw Pie Shells

items.note: Add the meat to the shells until you cook 25.

customItem.label: Deposit these and withdraw Gold, bucket of milk, potato, and either stuff to mage or melee with

items.note: Buy 15 Pineapples from the Charter Shop and a Tyras Helm

customItem.label: Equip the Helm
Start Meat and Greet and continue until you go to Ortus Farm

items.note: Kill a rat nearby
Kill a thief nearby

customItem.label: Go to Ortus Farm
Deposit the pineapples into the Compost Bin

items.note: Use a churn to make some butter.
Make a potato with butter
Pickpocket the master farmer for 1 Guam and 3 Potato Seeds

customItem.label: Buy 3 Compost, Seed Dibbler, 15 buckets, and a Spade from the farm shop
customItem.description: Store these with the farmer after you finish using them

items.note: Rake and Plant the Potato and Guam Seeds
Pay the farmer to protect the potatos with Compost

customItem.label: Compost the Guam

items.note: Kill a buffalo to the north

Continue Meat and Greet until you kill the Dire Wolf Alpha
If this doesnt count for the task reenter the cave and kill one

customItem.label: Continue Meat and Greet until you need go to the Colisseum

items.note: Finish the first wave of the Colisseum
Talk to any Gladiator nearby
Finish Meat and Greet

customItem.label: Withdraw 7 Vials of Water and Eyes of Newt
Run back to Ortus Farm
Harvest the Potatos and Guams

items.note: Clean the Guams then turn them into unfinished potions
Then into Attack potions
Grab 15 buckets and get the supercompost from the bin

You will need to farm 25 more Guams and turn them into attack potions at some point before we can do the Hunter quest. Every 16 minutes you can do a farm run.
Use the super compost to protect them, should take 4 or 5 runs hopefully.

customItem.label: Quetzal to Auburnvale
Deposit all, withdraw best axe and knife
Chop 5 Willow Logs

items.note: Complete the Vale Totems Miniquest
Fully Decorate a Totem with Oak Longbows (u)

customItem.label: Cut 50 Willow Logs

items.note: Fletch 50 Willow Longbows (u)
While doing Vale Totems Admire some beautiful scenery and step on an Ent Trail
Fully Decorate a Totem with Willow Longbows (u)

customItem.label: Do Vale Totems with Willow Longbows (u) until 55
customItem.description: We are doing Vale Totems now for the little bit of extra construction XP.

customItem.label: Chop 25 Maple Logs

items.note: Turn these into 25 Maple Longbows (u)
Fully Decorate 24 Totems with Maple Longbows (u)

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw best axe, harpoon, lobster pot, and tinderbox
customItem.description: I have to assume Karamja is unlocked by now. It isn't useful for any training prior to this so it doesn't matter if we delayed it.

customItem.label: Quetzal to Tel Teklan
Run to the southwest corner of the rainforest, to the hill. Go up the shortcut

items.note: Sit east or west of the picnic to equip an orange

customItem.label: Teleport to Fight Pits
Enter and Exit the fight caves
Exit the TzHaar area and then exit the volcano
Head north of the volcano to find 1 seaweed on the ground, pick it up and drop it 5 times
Run east to the banana plantation

items.note:
Pick 5 bananas and fill a crate with them after talking to Luthas
Drop the gold he gives you

Fish 75 Lobsters from the pier nearby
Chop trees and light them for a fire

customItem.label: Cook your Lobsters
Catch 100 Lobsters
customItem.description: (no L6 task ID found - kept as custom)

items.note: Cook your Tuna

Catch 135 Swordfish
You are done fishing once the task pops up
Cook 100 Swordfish

customItem.label: Tele back to the TzHaar Area
Deposit all, withdraw Staff of Water, Chaos/Death/Air Runes, Gold, Dramen Staff, Axe, Knife, Small Fishing Net, Pickaxe,
customItem.description: Equip the staff and shield

items.note: Safespot a TzHaar

customItem.label: Exit the Mor El Uk
Run north through the crack in the wall
Take the rope up to crandor
Exit crandor and go back through the wall, leave the volcano

items.note: Kill a Scorpion with the spear equiped

customItem.label: Head West through the gate to Brimhaven

items.note:
Enter the Brimhaven Agility Arena, do it until you have 10 Brimhaven Vouchers and 50 Agility
Can turn in the tickets for XP. Not sure how many this would take, but it should be quick
Exit the arena and purchase a snapdragon with the vouchers

customItem.label: Head east to Moss Giant Island, take the rope over
Kill a Moss Giant
Swing back and head northeast to the Gold Rocks
Mine one gold rock
Head south near the Brimhaven dungeon entrance

items.note: Kill a snake
Pick a Pineapple near the entrance

customItem.label: Pay to enter the dungeon
Deleve deeper into the dungeon by cutting vines and stepping over the stones until you get to the Stairs to the Greater
Go down the stairs, continue in the dungeon until you get to the black demons.

items.note: Safespot a black demon, then head towards the metal dragons
Kill a steel dragon

customItem.label: League teleport to Brimhaven
customItem.description: Or Minigame tele to TzHaar if that isn't a thing

customItem.label: Take the Cart from Hajedy to Shilo Village

items.note: Fish a Salmon in Shilo Village
Take the shortcut over the river
Go to the Inn, buy a ticket. Then go to the top floor to sleep
Go to the gem rocks and mine them until you get and chisel a Red topaz.

customItem.label: Keep mining and chiseling until you have equal to 1200 trading sticks from chiseled gems. Opal are 60, Jade 90, Red Topa
Exit Shilo Village through it's gate
Wrap around Shilo Village to Cairn Island on the Western Side
Climb the rocks, then walk over the bridge for the diary
Pass by the bridge again and go to the nearby lake

items.note:
Fish up Karambwanji
I would get a lot, as we can't buy it. 400-500+

customItem.label: Go to the general store to the north
Buy a machete

items.note:
Start and do part of the Tai Bwo Wanna Cleanup by chopping dense jungle and repairing the wall
You need 1% or more favor

customItem.label: Trade in the Gems to Gabooty

items.note: Buy and equip one whole villagar set with 1200 tickets

customItem.label: Sell the outfit back once you get the task, we need tickets.
Start and continue Tai Bwo Wanna Trio until you need to talk to Lubufu

items.note: Use 100 Trading sticks to get into the hardwood grove

customItem.label: Chop 1 Teak Log and 1 Mahogany Log
Exit the grove, and go northeast and then  west into the Pothole Dungeon
Kill a Jogre
League teleport to Brimhaven
customItem.description: Or Minigame tele to TzHaar if that isn't a thing

items.note: Get the Easy Karamja Diary rewards

customItem.label: Use the lamp on herblore
Talk to Lubufu to continue the quest until you can fish Karambwans. You won't be able to finish the quest.
League or Home Teleport to Civitas, withdraw Gold
Go to Ortus Farm
Steal from master Farmer for Limpwurt, Tarromin, and Marrentil Seeds
Plant the Limpwurt and Tarromin
customItem.description: Buy Compost and use it on them

customItem.label: Quetzal to Aldarin
Go to North Aldarin and kill at least 1 Unicorn for a horn
Quetzal back to Civitas
Go back to Ortus Farm
Harvest Limpwurt and Tarromin
customItem.description: If not ready yet pickpocket master farmer

customItem.label: Plant the Marrentil
customItem.description: Buy Compost and use it

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw Pickaxe
Quetzal to Sunset Coast
Run southeast to the agility course

items.note: Do 10 laps

customItem.label: Run East to Stonecutter Outpost

items.note:
Mine 50 Mithril and one coal
You can bank if you want, but isn't required

customItem.label: Run back to sunset coast Quetzal
Quetzal to Hunter Guild, run north to Ortus Farm
Harvest your marrentil
Run east into the bank
Withdraw Pestle and Mortar, Vials of Water, Limpwurt, Marrentil, Tarromin, and unicorn Horn

items.note: Crush the Unicorn Horn then make an Antipoison
Make a Strength Potion and drink it

customItem.label: Deposit all, withdraw Butterfly net
Quetzal to Ralos Rise
Run North to the Mountain North of here

items.note: Catch Snowy Knights until 46 Hunter

customItem.label: Quetzal to the Hunter's Guild
Withdraw Gold, Costume Needle, Hammer, Axe, Knife
Buy Box Traps at the nearby shop

items.note:
Complete At First Light
During the quest, when catching Jerboa go into the cave to the East
Catch a Pyre fox to the southeast after the quest

Complete Hunter Rumors until 57
From here it is a your pickn of longer grinds that aren't as focused as the previous guide. You can continue and it will give you guidance what to do, or you can start branching out and even going to your new regions.

Complete Adept Rumors until you get 72 Hunter
When you finish 10 Rumors get your whistle blueprint from the Soar Leader on top of the guild. Make the Whistle

Do Expert rumors until you get 25 Rumors done
You can get a block list for Aco to just be Red Chins, but there are very few on Varlamore and it isn't super viable. Antelope would be more realistic, even with Woodsman.

customItem.label: You should get enough feed to make a Quetzal landing site

items.note:
Buy the resources to do so and build one near the agility course
If you dont have enough feed do more rumors
You should have an easy clue or two from Wealthy Citizens. Do them until you get a unique
Complete your slayer task if you haven't.
Get new tasks until you kill at least 250 slayer monsters, and hit 48 slayer

customItem.label: Craft and sell rubies for 20k or more GP in Aldarin
Purchase a rune mace from the shop in Outer Fortis

items.note: Defeat an Oryx in the Avium Savannah with melee.

Complete The Heart of Darkness, while doing the quest activate the statue of ates East of the Tower of Ascension
Bring Rune Mace+Full Addy+Food
1 Amoxliatl Kill

Kill 10 Frost Crabs
Use the Rune Mace
Kill either Amoxliatl or Frost Naguas until you get a pendant and Glacial Temolti, also get 55 attack and equip both

customItem.label: League Teleport to Civitas

items.note: Sacrifice your rune mace to Death's coffer

customItem.label: Quetzal to Tel Taklan
Purchase 4 Willow Longbows
Quetzal to Auburnvale

items.note: Withdraw food and combat weapons+equipment, then go to a mass world and kill Huey once

customItem.label: Go to the moons of Peril

items.note: Get and equip the Sulphur Blades

customItem.label: Quetzal to Tel Taklan
Withdraw Fly Fishing Rod, Tinderbox, Axe, and Feathers
Fish and cook fish until 65 Fishing
Withdraw Dramen Staff, Karambwan Vessel, Karabwanji
Go to the Karambwan fishing spot via fiary ring DKP
Cook your Karambwans
